mishustin.name: Mikhail Vladimirovich Mishustin
mishustin.quote: According to the base scenario of the Strategy for the Development of Unmanned Aviation of the Russian Federation up to 2030, it is necessary to train 1 million UAV industry workers by 2030.

whatIsADT.title: What is a Wind Tunnel?
whatIsADT.description: An aerodynamic wind tunnel (AWT) is a specialized complex designed to simulate the effects of the environment on objects moving through it. Wind tunnels enable physical experiments on full-scale and scaled objects to obtain data for optimizing the shape and design of various objects.
